steps.t: The creature which devoured the white hart may have left tracks nearby, which you should <rgb=#FF00FF>look</rgb> for. While you were able …
The creature's tracks lead north-east from the carcass of the white hart towards the river. You should follow the creature's tracks.
The creature's tracks continue north-east towards the river. You should continue to follow the creature's tracks.
The creature's tracks continue eastwards along the river-bank. You should continue to follow the creature's tracks.
